concerns.text: FR-008 text is corrupted/duplicated: 'System MUST verify dataset-variable fit and record System MUST verify that EMP dataset contains required variables...' The requirement statement is malformed and cannot be verified as written.

FR-011 requires threshold sweeps over {0.01, 0.05, 0.1} for 'inconsistency rates' but this research is observational (no classification thresholds). The requirement appears misaligned with the study design and may need rewording or removal.

FR-013 requires 'validated instruments for questionnaires or measurement scales' but this study uses public datasets (EMP, USDA) with no questionnaires. This requirement appears out-of-scope for the research design.
